title: chrysosplenium pilosum var. barbatum
intro: Chrysosplenium pilosum var. barbatum, also known as the Barbed Wintercress or Barbed Yellow-saxifrage, is a type of flowering plant in the Saxifragaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Chrysosplenium pilosum var. barbatum include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, it can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
